channel.title: Copilot Student on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Copilot Student on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GPT-5.4 mini is now available in Copilot Student auto model selection
item.description:
GPT-5.4 mini is now generally available to Copilot Student users through Copilot auto model selection. It is included in Auto for GitHub Copilot Chat in supported clients such as Visual Studio Code and Visual Studio.

  • Source: GitHub
